# ADR-011 Compliance — AI & Automation

**Governance phase:** 3.5 · **Authority document:** `docs/ADR-011-*.md` · **Date:** 2026-07-19
**Verifier:** `architecture/compliance/verify-architecture.mjs` · **Do not edit the ADR itself.**

## Purpose
Define the AI/automation context: intelligent matching, pricing, fraud, support automation.

## Scope
Enterprise AI & automation architecture. No models/vendors.

## Current implementation status
**Proposed; Not started — 5% compliant.**

## Implemented components
- (none in application code today)

## Remaining work
- Entire AI context (matching intelligence, dynamic pricing, fraud, support automation)

## Evidence
- MCP tooling exists but is operator tooling, not the AI context

## Related source code
- (none yet)

## Related tests
- (none yet — covered by review/live proof)

## Compliance percentage
**5%** — honest estimate: weight of ADR requirements realized under the ADR-005
layered architecture with evidence, vs. total requirements named in the ADR.

## Risks
- No AI capability — pure roadmap

## Required actions
- Defer until core contexts migrated + data platform (Postgres) live
